contextBlurb: Nunavut's housing legislation is primarily administered through the Nunavut Housing Corporation, which received $87,185,000 in capital appropriations under Bill 2, the Appropriation (Capital) Act, 2026-2027. Recent legislative activity includes supplementary capital and operations appropriations, as well as an amendment to the Nunavut Housing Act noted in the Annual Statutes. Public housing oversight has also been subject to review by the Office of the Auditor General.

legislation.title: Appropriation (Capital) Act, 2026-2027
legislation.summary: Authorizes the Government of Nunavut to make capital expenditures for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2027, including $87,185,000 allocated to the Nunavut Housing Corporation.

legislation.title: Interim Appropriation (Operations and Maintenance) Act, 2026-2027
legislation.summary: Authorizes the Government of Nunavut to make interim operations and maintenance expenditures for the 2026-2027 fiscal year.

legislation.title: Supplementary Appropriation (Capital) Act, No. 3, 2025-2026
legislation.summary: A supplementary capital appropriation for the 2025-2026 fiscal year, considered during the fall 2025 legislative session.

legislation.title: Interim Appropriation (Capital) Act, 2026-2027
legislation.summary: Authorizes interim capital expenditures for the Government of Nunavut for the 2026-2027 fiscal year.

legislation.title: Write-Off of Assets Act, 2024-2025
legislation.summary: Authorizes the write-off of certain government assets for the 2024-2025 fiscal year, passed at third reading in September 2025.

legislation.title: Supplementary Appropriations (Operations and Maintenance) Act, No. 3, 2025-2026
legislation.summary: Authorizes supplementary operations and maintenance expenditures for the 2025-2026 fiscal year, assented to by the Commissioner of Nunavut.

legislation.title: Supplementary Appropriation (Capital) Act, No. 2, 2025-2026
legislation.summary: A supplementary capital appropriation for the 2025-2026 fiscal year, considered during the spring/summer 2025 legislative session.

legislation.title: Miscellaneous Statutes Amendment Act
legislation.summary: An omnibus amendment act covering miscellaneous statutes in Nunavut, referenced alongside other short bills in the spring 2025 sitting of the Legislative Assembly.

legislation.title: 2025-2026 Main Estimates of the Nunavut Housing Corporation
legislation.summary: The annual main estimates tabled before the Nunavut Legislative Assembly outlining the Nunavut Housing Corporation's planned capital and operational expenditures for 2025-2026.
